tut1: Destroy the column of blocks using the drill.
tut2: Mix the blocks using the cube.
tut3: Destroy the line with a rocket.
tut4: Destroy the block with a hammer.
tut5: Collect the remaining blocks until the goal is completed.
tut6: Destroy blocks by clicking on a group of them.
tut7: To destroy the light bulb, destroy the blocks nearby twice.
tut8: To destroy a box, destroy adjacent blocks.
tut9: Destroy the balls along with the adjacent blocks.
complete: Congratulations, you have completed the game!
